Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters

Class AbstractRewriterImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultRewriter
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AbstractRewriterImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaRewriter, IFormulaRewriter2
Direct Known Subclasses:
InclusionSetMinusLeftRewriterImpl, InclusionSetMinusRightRewriterImpl, PredicateSimplifier, RemoveMembershipRewriterImpl
public abstract class AbstractRewriterImpl extends DefaultRewriter
Abstract implementation of a formula rewriter. The purpose of this class is to provide various utility methods that help writing reasoners that perform formula rewriting. Laurent Voisin
